name: Toyhouse Character
noteContentFormat:
`VIEW[*part of: {bases}*][text(renderMarkdown)]`

----
> [!col]
> `VIEW[{image}][image(class(profile-image))]`
>
>> [!col-md]
>>> [!quote] A short quote that defines them.
>>
>>> [!info] Full Name
>> pronouns, 00 y/o, gen., sex.
>> **Occupation:** 
>> **Group Affiliation:** 
>> **Species:** 
>> 
>>> [!summary] In a nutshell...
>> A lost woman who works in the world of dreams.

----
# Vault data
## Alternate versions
````base
filters:
  or:
    - file.inFolder("Worldbuilding/Characters/{{selector:.profile-name-info > h1}}")
    - parent == link("{{selector:.profile-name-info > h1}}")
views:
  - type: cards
    name: Alt. versions
    filters:
      and:
        - file.name != "{{selector:.profile-name-info > h1}}"
    order:
      - about
    image: note.cover
    cardSize: 130

````

## Works
````base
filters:
  and:
    - note["feat. characters"].contains(link("{{selector:.profile-name-info > h1}}"))
    - bases.contains(link("Works"))
views:
  - type: cards
    name: Works
    groupBy:
      property: completed?
      direction: DESC
    sort:
      - property: date
        direction: DESC
      - property: priority
        direction: ASC
      - property: file.name
        direction: ASC
    imageAspectRatio: 0.6
    cardSize: 150
    image: note.cover

````
## Notes and bits
````base
filters:
  and:
    - bases.containsAny(link("Corkboard"))
    - file.hasLink("{{selector:.profile-name-info > h1}}")
views:
  - type: list
    name: Works
    order:
      - file.name
      - date
    sort:
      - property: file.name
        direction: ASC
    imageAspectRatio: 0.6
    cardSize: 220
    indentProperties: false

````
## Relevant pins
````base
filters:
  and:
    - file.links.contains(link("{{selector:.profile-name-info > h1}}"))
    - bases.contains(link("Pin2rest"))
views:
  - type: cards
    name: Pin2rest
    order: []
    sort:
      - property: date
        direction: DESC
    imageAspectRatio: 1.4
    cardSize: 100
    image: note.image

````
## Journal entries
````base
filters:
  and:
    - bases.containsAny(link("Dreams"), link("Journal"))
    - file.hasLink("{{selector:.profile-name-info > h1}}")
views:
  - type: cards
    name: Works
    order:
      - file.name
      - mood
    sort:
      - property: file.name
        direction: DESC
    cardSize: 130

````
